Services.label: What We Do
Services.title: End-to-end digital
Services.service1Desc: Interfaces users actually love — from wireframes to polished, pixel-perfect products.
Services.service2Desc: Fast, scalable applications built with the latest frameworks and best practices.
Services.service3Desc: Intelligent workflows and LLM-powered tools that save time and reduce errors.
Services.service4Desc: Cohesive visual languages that make your brand instantly recognizable worldwide.

Process.label: How We Work
Process.title: Our process,
Process.discoveryDesc: Deep-dive into your goals, users, and market. We define what success looks like before writing a single line of code.
Process.designDesc: High-fidelity designs and interactive prototypes that let you see and feel the product before it's built.
Process.buildDesc: Agile development cycles with weekly demos. You always know what we're working on and why.
Process.launchDesc: We handle deployment, monitor performance, and stay with you after launch to iterate and grow.

WhyUs.label: Why Vynta
WhyUs.title: Built for
WhyUs.description: Most agencies overpromise and underdeliver. We operate differently. Small team, radical transparency, and a bias for shipping.
WhyUs.item1Desc: We measure everything and optimize relentlessly. If it doesn't work, we adapt.
WhyUs.item2Desc: No juniors on your project. Every engagement is led by an experienced senior.
WhyUs.item3Desc: First prototype in under 2 weeks. We move fast without sacrificing quality.

CTA.title: Let's build
CTA.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with honest advice, no sales pitch.

Contact.label: Get in touch
Contact.title: Let's build something
Contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll respond within 24 hours with honest advice, a rough timeline, and a ballpark number. No strings attached.

Contact.messageReceivedDesc: We'll review your project and get back to you within 24 hours. Check your inbox.
Contact.prefieresLlamadaDesc: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. Pick the time that works best for you.
Contact.disponibleDesc: We currently have capacity for 1–2 new projects starting this quarter.

ServicesPage.label: What do we do?
ServicesPage.title: Services designed for
ServicesPage.subtitle: We offer comprehensive digital services. Whether you need a specialized skill or a full-stack partner, we adapt to your needs.

s1.title: Digital product design
s1.subtitle: UX & UI Design
s1.description: We design interfaces that users actually enjoy using. From initial concept to polished Figma files, every screen is built with real users in mind, not just aesthetics.

s2.title: Web engineering
s2.subtitle: Frontend & Backend
s2.description: We build fast, scalable, and maintainable applications using the most suitable technologies for your needs. We don't blindly follow trends — we choose what works.

s3.title: AI & automation
s3.subtitle: LLMs & Intelligent Workflows
s3.description: We integrate AI into real products, not demos. From intelligent document processing to custom LLM-powered assistants, we build automations that actually save time and money.

s4.title: Brand & identity
s4.subtitle: Visual strategy
s4.description: Your brand is more than a logo. We develop complete visual identities that scale across every touchpoint — from web to print, presentations to social media.

ServicesPage.ctaSubtitle: Book a free 30-minute meeting. We'll listen, ask the right questions, and recommend the best path forward — no sales pressure.

About.label: The Agency
About.title: We are Vynta.
About.subtitle: Founded in 2026, we're a digital agency specializing in AI. We don't take on 40 clients at once. We focus on a handful of ambitious projects and pour everything into making them exceptional.
About.story1: Most digital agencies grew too fast. They scaled to hundreds of employees, took on every client they could, and started optimizing for revenue over results. Your project would be handled by whoever was available, not whoever was best.
About.story2: We created Vynta as the solution. A small, focused agency where every person does their job well, adapting to your criteria without any hassle.
About.story3: We're selective about the projects we take on — not because we're arrogant, but because we genuinely believe that fewer, better projects lead to better results for everyone.

v1.title: Radical transparency
v1.desc: You'll always know what we're working on, why, and how much it costs. No hidden charges, no surprises.

v2.title: Quality over quantity
v2.desc: We work with fewer clients to give each project the attention it deserves. Your project is never just a number.

v3.title: Senior talent, always
v3.desc: Every project is led by experienced seniors. We never hand your project off to juniors.

v4.title: Results that make sense
v4.desc: We measure success by outcomes, not deliverables. If it doesn't move the needle, we iterate.

About.ctaSubtitle: We have room for one or two new clients this quarter. If you're building something ambitious, we'd love to hear from you.
